title: DUX v9.5 Result Object
description: Measurable outcome from behavior change - tracks what happens when users adopt new behaviors

object_type.description: Object type discriminator - always 'Result' for Result objects

target_impact.description: Clear description of the business' desired impact, revenue targets, cost reduction target

evidence_maturity.description: Progressive evidence maturity tier: 01_assumptive (inferred, no direct support), 02_anecdotal (1-2 qualitative signals), 03_early_signal (recurring signal, no quant), 04_balanced_signal (qualitative + quantitative), 05_triangulated (cross-method validation)

evidence.description: Array of Provenance object IDs that support this result's validity and measurement

reference_context.description: LLM-generated explanation of why this relationship exists

useroutcome_ids.description: User outcomes that measure progress toward this result - NOTE: Required validation creates 800+ relationship audit challenge, REVISIT for HITL scalability solutions

tags.description: System-derived tags generated by NotebookLM DUX scan - not manually set
